plist.dict:
CADisableMinimumFrameDurationOnPhone
CFBundleDevelopmentRegion $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE) CFBundleDisplayName C2C CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleInfoDictionaryVersion 6.0 CFBundleName c2c CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleShortVersionString kk 1.0.14 CFBundleSignature ???? CFBundleURLTypes
CFBundleTypeRole Editor CFBundleURLName com.c2cstreetdeals.app CFBundleURLSchemes
https
CFBundleVersion 21 FlutterDeepLinkingEnabled
ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption
LSApplicationQueriesSchemes
https http
LSRequiresIPhoneOS
NSAppTransportSecurity
NSAllowsArbitraryLoads
NSCameraUsageDescription C2C needs access to your camera to take profile picture and upload a product. NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription C2C requires access to your location to add address for profile and product location. NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription C2C requires access to your location to add address and product location. NSLocationUsageDescription C2C requires access to your location to add address and product location. NSMicrophoneUsageDescription C2C requires access to your microphone access for recording. NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription C2C requires access to your location to add address and product location. NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription C2C needs access to your photo library to upload profile picture and upload a product. UIApplicationSupportsIndirectInputEvents
UIBackgroundModes
remote-notification
UILaunchStoryboardName LaunchScreen UIMainStoryboardFile Main UISupportedInterfaceOrientations
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeLeft UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeRight
UISupportedInterfaceOrientations~ipad
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait UIInterfaceOrientationPortraitUpsideDown UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeLeft UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeRight
FirebaseAppDelegateProxyEnabled
